text.title: embedding-model-selection Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embedding-model-selection as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Switching the embedding model mid-pipeline because a newer model was released, without re-indexing the entire corpus.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The new vectors occupy a different latent space. Cosine similarity between old and new vectors is meaningless. All retrieval results become wrong without full re-ingestion.

failure-mode.description: Cohere's embed-multilingual-v3.0 called with texts exceeding 512 tokens without pre-chunking.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cohere silently truncates server-side at 512 tokens. The resulting vector represents only the first 512 tokens, not the full text.
